overview.description: Enterprise AI platform with AI Chat, Search, Agents and Workflows for business teams
overview.description_long: Siesta AI is a European technology company developing a secure, model-agnostic enterprise AI platform. The platform enables companies to deploy AI assistants, copilots, and autonomous agents across all departments (Engineering, Sales, Marketing, Finance, Operations, HR, Legal) without per-user licensing. Key products include AI Chat, AI Search, AI Agents, Workflows, Recordings, and Analytics. The company focuses on on-premise/hybrid deployment options and supports 11+ European languages.
overview.tagline: Enterprise AI platform — AI chat for everyone, we don't charge per user

history.origin_story: Built by an international team of experienced engineers, designers, and product thinkers. The company positions itself as a European alternative to hyperscaler AI products from Microsoft, Google, and OpenAI, emphasising security and model-agnosticism.

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: Siesta AI is a model-agnostic enterprise AI platform building on top of third-party LLMs — the same space Microsoft 365 Copilot, Google Workspace Gemini, and OpenAI enterprise directly target. With no proprietary models and a value prop centred on UI/UX and per-workspace pricing, the core offering is highly replicable by well-resourced incumbents.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: The enterprise AI assistant market is real and growing, with 100,000+ daily users indicating product-market fit. However, it is highly competitive: Microsoft, Google, Slack, and Notion all offer native AI assistants with superior distribution. Siesta AI's model-agnostic, privacy-first, per-workspace pricing model provides some differentiation for European enterprises with data-sovereignty requirements.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: No known external funding rounds have been identified. The company appears bootstrapped with a small team (~40 people). Without venture backing, runway to sustain growth against well-funded competitors is unclear.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: The combination of high AGI displacement risk (direct competition from hyperscalers) and high funding risk (no known external investment) results in an overall high risk profile, despite the positive signal of 100k+ daily users.

metadata.notes: Address: Bruselská 266/14, 120 00 Praha. Press contact: Jan Mudroch (press@siesta.ai). Pricing: Free (limited tokens), Company €700/month (€500 annual), Enterprise custom. Platform supports 11 European languages. 'Mikolas' appears to be a sales contact (calendly.com/mikolas). LinkedIn page exists at https://cz.linkedin.com/company/siesta-ai but requires login. The '10+ years as trusted innovators' likely refers to team experience, not company age.
